codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements. The ER page is reachable at /er/ with standard Layout usage, sidebar navigation includes the ER Diagram entry with active-path matching, and the commit adds mobile-specific responsiveness improvements for toolbar wrapping and panel/container behavior at <=768px. No blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture docs are stale for this milestone: the library still states the ER diagram page is pending even though /er/ is implemented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:69 says "ER diagram page remains pending" while implemented page exists at web/src/pages/er.astro and navigation entry exists in web/src/components/NavSidebar.astro:14.

sharedStateObservations.observation: astro-frontend skill guidance appears slightly ambiguous for CSS-only/navigation tasks: it emphasizes writing new Vitest tests when configured, but this feature was validated via existing test suites plus agent-browser visual checks without adding new tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/astro-frontend/SKILL.md:37 instructs "Write Vitest tests (RED)"; handoff skill feedback flags this nuance at mission handoff file lines 68-69; transcript skeleton shows agent-browser verification usage (/tmp/er-navigation-skeleton.md:486).

summary: Reviewed er-navigation (commit 86342d0) against feature expectations and transcript evidence. Result: PASS — requirements for /er/ accessibility via sidebar, standard layout usage, mobile responsiveness, and no observed regressions were met.
